message:
fix(guard): block polecats from pushing directly to main

Add matchesPolecatDirectPushToMain guard to prevent polecats from bypassing the
Refinery merge queue via git push origin branch:main. Context-aware: only blocks
in polecat context (GT_POLECAT set), crew pushes to main are unaffected. Hook
registered in config.go and all agent settings templates (claude, cursor, gemini,
copilot).

Closes #3083

Co-Authored-By: Chris Deal <cdeal@mines.edu>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
